query:
SELECT 
  id,
  orderNo,
  customerName,
  salespersonId,
  trafficSource,
  courseAmount,
  paymentAmount,
  teacherFee,
  transportFee,
  partnerFee,
  paymentChannel,
  channelOrderNo,
  classDate,
  deliveryCity,
  deliveryTeacher,
  deliveryCourse,
  orderStatus,
  notes
FROM orders 
ORDER BY createdAt DESC 
LIMIT 50;
